step_rationale: Regulates HDL-mediated reverse cholesterol transport; dysregulation affects lipoprotein metabolism.
mechanism: CETP modulates HDL cholesterol content and ApoB-lipoprotein metabolism, influencing atherosclerotic burden.

references.title: Pharmacologic augmentation of high-density lipoproteins: mechanisms of currently available and emerging therapies.

trials.title: Investigation of Relationship Between Cholesteryl Ester Transfer Protein Deficiency and Carotid/Coronary Atherosclerosis in Patients With Hyperalphalipoproteinemia
